ClassPattern.description:
Represents a class pattern.

**Usage:**
```python
ClassPattern(credits=3, meetings=[...])
```

start_time.description: Fixed start fallback for meetings without their own start time

ClassPattern.title: ClassPattern

CourseConfig.description:
Represents a course configuration.

**Usage:**
```python
CourseConfig(
    course_id="CS 101",
    credits=3,
    capacity=30,
    room=["Room 101"],
    lab=[],
    conflicts=[],
    faculty=["Dr. Smith"],
)
```

course_id.description: Base course identifier; repeated values create separately numbered sections

section_id.description: Optional stable section suffix; null uses the generated zero-padded input-order number
section_id.title: Section Id

capacity.description: Expected section enrollment that any assigned rooms and labs must accommodate
capacity.title: Capacity

room.description: Allowed room names; empty is valid only for compatible patterns that do not occupy a room
room.title: Room

lab.description: Acceptable labs; an empty list means the course has no lab meeting
lab.title: Lab

conflicts.description: Base course IDs whose sections cannot overlap; an empty list means no declared conflicts
conflicts.title: Conflicts

faculty.description: Non-empty faculty candidates, or null to derive candidates from faculty course-preference keys
faculty.title: Faculty

modality.description: Required delivery composition of the selected class pattern

required_room_features.description: Feature tags every assigned lecture room must provide
required_room_features.title: Required Room Features

required_lab_features.description: Feature tags every assigned lab must provide
required_lab_features.title: Required Lab Features

reserve_room_during_lab.description: Whether the lab meeting also occupies the section's assigned lecture room
reserve_room_during_lab.title: Reserve Room During Lab

CourseConfig.title: CourseConfig

CourseModality.description: Required mixture of meeting delivery modes for a course section.
CourseModality.title: CourseModality

DeliveryMode.description: Delivery mode for one generated meeting.
DeliveryMode.title: DeliveryMode

FacultyConfig.description:
Represents a faculty configuration.

**Usage:**
```python
FacultyConfig(name="Dr. Smith", maximum_credits=12, minimum_credits=3, ...)
```

maximum_credits.description: Maximum credit hours they can teach
maximum_credits.title: Maximum Credits

maximum_days.description: Maximum number of days they are willing to teach (0-5, optional)
maximum_days.title: Maximum Days

minimum_credits.description: Minimum credit hours they must teach
minimum_credits.title: Minimum Credits

unique_course_limit.description: Maximum number of different courses they can teach
unique_course_limit.title: Unique Course Limit

times.description: Availability ranges keyed by weekday; omitted days and empty lists mean unavailable
times.title: Times

course_preferences.description: Dictionary mapping course IDs to preference scores
course_preferences.title: Course Preferences

room_preferences.description: Dictionary mapping room IDs to preference scores
room_preferences.title: Room Preferences

lab_preferences.description: Dictionary mapping lab IDs to preference scores
lab_preferences.title: Lab Preferences

mandatory_days.description: Set of days the faculty must teach on
mandatory_days.title: Mandatory Days

FacultyConfig.title: FacultyConfig

LabConfig.description:
A laboratory resource that can be assigned to a section's lab meeting.

Fields:
    name: Unique, nonblank identifier used by course lab candidates, faculty
        preferences, generated schedules, and diagnostics.
    capacity: Positive count of usable student seats. Lab assignments require
        a value at least as large as the course section capacity.
    features: Facility or equipment tags supplied by the lab. A lab is
        eligible only when it contains every feature required by the course.
    times: Optional availability windows for every scheduler weekday. ``None``
        means unrestricted availability; a mapping restricts the lab meeting
        to the listed windows.

name.description: Unique, nonblank lab name used by references and schedule output
name.title: Name

capacity.description: Maximum number of students the lab can accommodate
capacity.title: Capacity

features.description: Facility and equipment feature tags supplied by this lab
features.title: Features

times.description: Optional weekday lab availability windows; null means unrestricted availability
times.title: Times

LabConfig.title: LabConfig

Meeting.description:
Represents a single meeting instance.

**Usage:**
```python
Meeting(day="MON", duration=90, lab=False)
```

start_time.description: Fixed start for this meeting; overrides the containing pattern start time

duration.description: Duration of the meeting in minutes
duration.title: Duration

lab.description: Whether this is the pattern's single lab meeting
lab.title: Lab

delivery.description: Whether this meeting is held in person or online

Meeting.title: Meeting

RoomConfig.description:
A lecture-room resource that can be assigned to physical course meetings.

Fields:
    name: Unique, nonblank identifier used by course room candidates,
        faculty preferences, generated schedules, and diagnostics.
    capacity: Positive count of usable student seats. Physical assignments
        require a value at least as large as the course section capacity.
    features: Facility or equipment tags supplied by the room. A room is
        eligible only when it contains every feature required by the course.
    times: Optional availability windows for every scheduler weekday. ``None``
        means unrestricted availability; a mapping restricts occupancy to the
        listed windows.

name.description: Unique, nonblank room name used by references and schedule output
name.title: Name

capacity.description: Maximum number of students the room can accommodate
capacity.title: Capacity

features.description: Facility and equipment feature tags supplied by this room
features.title: Features

times.description: Optional weekday room availability windows; null means unrestricted availability
times.title: Times

RoomConfig.title: RoomConfig

SchedulerConfig.description:
Represents a scheduler configuration.

**Usage:**
```python
SchedulerConfig(
    rooms=[RoomConfig(name="Room 101", capacity=40)],
    labs=[LabConfig(name="Lab 101", capacity=24)],
    courses=[...],
    faculty=[...],
)
```
SchedulerConfig.title: SchedulerConfig

TimeBlock.description:
Represents a time block within a day.

**Usage:**
```python
TimeBlock(start="09:00", spacing=60, end="17:00")
```

start.description: Start time of the time block

spacing.description: Time spacing between slots in minutes
spacing.title: Spacing

end.description: End time of the time block

TimeBlock.title: TimeBlock

TimeRange.description:
A time range with start and end times, ensuring start < end.

**Usage:**
```python
TimeRange(start="09:00", end="17:00")
```

start.description: Start time of the time range

end.description: End time of the time range

TimeRange.title: TimeRange

TimeSlotConfig.description:
Represents a time slot configuration.

**Usage:**
```python
TimeSlotConfig(times={...}, classes=[...])
```

times.description: Time blocks keyed by weekday; every Monday-Friday list must be non-empty
times.title: Times

classes.description: Meeting patterns; at least one pattern must be enabled
classes.title: Classes

max_time_gap.description: Maximum gap in minutes used to determine whether meetings are adjacent
max_time_gap.title: Max Time Gap

min_time_overlap.description: Minimum clock-time overlap in minutes between meetings on different pattern days
min_time_overlap.title: Min Time Overlap

TimeSlotConfig.title: TimeSlotConfig

description:
Represents a combined configuration.

**Usage:**
```python
CombinedConfig(config=..., time_slot_config=..., limit=10)
```

limit.description: Maximum number of schedules to generate
limit.title: Limit

title: CombinedConfig
